title: Ubiquiti UACC-OM-SM-10G-S-2 (UF-SM-10G-S) - U Fiber, Single-Mode Module, 10G, BiDi, 2-Pack
description: UF-SM-10G-S is set of singlemode 10G SFP+ WDM modules with 1 LC connector. Wave length is 1270/1330nm , this modules are suitable for distance up to 10km . Modules are compatible with all Ubiquiti devices which contain SFP+ ports. Package contains 2 pieces - 1 function pair
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP+ For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 10 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1270 / 1330, 1330 / 1270 Distance [km] 10 Transfer type WDM Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (1) LC General Compatibility Universal
